title: [BUG] Promise.resolve(...).finally is not a function in Firefox 66-68
author: gerhat
body:
Simply importing `ExcelJS` breaks a react application in Firefox 66-68 (could be in versions < 66 but haven't tested) since it somehow overrides `Promise.resolve(...).finally` for this browser.

ExcelJS versions: 4.2.1, 3.8.1

**Steps To Reproduce:**
You may reproduce the error by cloning this repo:
https://github.com/gerhat/ExcelJS-Firefox-66-68-issue

**The expected behaviour:**
It should work correctly in firefox >=66

comments.author: tkallsen
